## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` (typecheck + build) passes
- [ ] `pnpm exec vitest run` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` is clean
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour/contracts changed (`docs/` and/or `wiki/`)
- [ ] Change is focused (no unrelated refactors)
